message:
🐛 fix: remove heredocs causing YAML syntax errors

Replace heredoc syntax with simple variable assignments.
The YAML parser has issues with heredocs inside run blocks.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -115,13 +115,11 @@ jobs:
               echo "Issue #$number: Link still broken (hash: $issue_hash)"
             else
               echo "Issue #$number: Link appears to be fixed, closing..."
+              close_comment=$(printf '%s\n\n%s' \
+                "This link appears to be fixed! Verified by the automated link checker." \
+                "If this was closed in error, please reopen the issue.")
               gh issue close "$number" --repo kubestellar/docs \
-                --comment "$(cat <<'EOF'
-✅ This link appears to be fixed! Verified by the automated link checker.
-
-If this was closed in error, please reopen the issue.
-EOF
-)" || echo "Failed to close issue #$number"
+                --comment "$close_comment" || echo "Failed to close issue #$number"
               sleep 1
             fi
           done
@@ -157,11 +155,7 @@ EOF
 
             # Create new issue
             echo "Creating issue for broken link: $url (status: $status)"
-            gh issue create --repo kubestellar/docs \
-              --title "$issue_title" \
-              --label "help wanted,bug,documentation" \
-              --body "$(cat <<EOF
-## Broken Link Detected
+            issue_body="## Broken Link Detected
 
 **URL:** \`$url\`
 **Status:** $status
@@ -175,9 +169,11 @@ This broken link was automatically detected by the link checker workflow.
 3. Submit a PR with the fix
 
 ---
-🤖 Auto-generated by [docs-link-checker](https://github.com/kubestellar/infra/actions/workflows/docs-link-checker.yml)
-EOF
-)" || echo "Failed to create issue for $url"
+Auto-generated by [docs-link-checker](https://github.com/kubestellar/infra/actions/workflows/docs-link-checker.yml)"
+            gh issue create --repo kubestellar/docs \
+              --title "$issue_title" \
+              --label "help wanted,bug,documentation" \
+              --body "$issue_body" || echo "Failed to create issue for $url"
 
             # Rate limit to avoid API issues
             sleep 2
